links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The yellow-throated antwren (Myrmotherula ambigua) is a species of bird in subfamily Thamnophilinae of family Thamnophilidae, the "typical antbirds". It is found in Brazil, Colombia, and Venezuela.Remsen, J

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The yellow-throated antwren is found in southwestern Venezuela's Amazonas state, in extreme eastern Colombia's Guainía and Vaupés departments, and in Brazil in the upper basin of the Rio Negro
